title: NIST PQC Evaluation Process and Methodology
description: Deep dive into how NIST evaluated post-quantum cryptographic submissions, including criteria, rounds, and decision-making methodology.
learningObjectives: Understand the multi-round evaluation structure used by NIST
Explain the primary and secondary evaluation criteria
Describe the role of public cryptanalysis in the process
Analyze how NIST balanced security, performance, and diversity
Identify lessons learned from the evaluation process
